data.name: Corrupted Hottie
data.detailed_description:
A short adult visual novel where you build a relationship with your new roommate. Your main goal is to increase Maria’s affection and corruption through a day and night cycle. Leading you to unlock story events and lewd animations overtime.

FEATURES

  • Animated sex scenes with sound effects (moaning, wetness, etc).
  • Day and night cycle.
  • Affection and corruption game mechanic.
  • 2 different endings.
  • Approximately 1 hour in length.

data.short_description: An adult visual novel where you seduce and corrupt your new roommate. Slowly influencing her into becoming more rebellious and sexual.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2.0 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2.0 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2.0 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
